latest.name: recallguard-governed-workflow-v5-public-data
latest.description: Sequential workflow v5: Knowledge Agent then public-data Task Agent with explicit System.LastMessage input

definition.workflow:
kind: Workflow
trigger:
  kind: OnConversationStart
  id: recallguard_governed_review_v5_public_data
  actions:
    - kind: InvokeAzureAgent
      id: invoke_knowledge_agent
      displayName: Ground product safety criteria
      conversationId: =System.ConversationId
      agent:
        name: recallguard-knowledge-agent
      input:
        messages: =System.LastMessage

    - kind: InvokeAzureAgent
      id: invoke_task_agent
      displayName: Check vendor product evidence
      conversationId: =System.ConversationId
      agent:
        name: recallguard-task-agent-v7-public-data
      input:
        messages: =System.LastMessage
